name.description: Kebab-case app name, for example supplier-quality.

domain.description: Platform domain group such as quality, operations, warehouse, or demo.

context.description: Snake-case bounded context folder name. Defaults to the app name converted to snake case.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name. Defaults to title-cased app name.

demo.description: Generate demo-ready empty-state payloads and placeholder metric values.

minimal.description: Scaffold a minimal concept module without full DDD layers
